facts.answer: Asian Food Centre describes itself as a one-stop shop for grocery, meat, sweets, and takeaway needs, with fresh produce, fresh and marinated meat, and groceries from many brands.
The site highlights fruits, vegetables, dairy, rice, flour, daal, spices, pickles, frozen food, housewares, herbal products, meat, sweets, and takeaway food.
The brand invites customers to check weekly in-store specials; the website also has New Products, On Sale, Best Sellers, and Monthly Flyer links.
The homepage advertises free delivery for orders over CAD 99. The dedicated delivery page currently says 'Coming Soon', so delivery area, timing, and eligibility should be confirmed with the store.
The homepage advertises online-order pickup. The dedicated curbside-pickup page currently says 'Coming Soon', so pickup instructions should be confirmed with the selected store.
The website lists eight stores: one in Etobicoke, six in Brampton, and one in Mississauga.

Sale and gift/voucher-card purchases are final sale. Opened or tampered items cannot be returned. Perishable goods, produce, and hot foods cannot be returned; customers should ask store management about specific cases.
Catalog availability and prices can change. Confirm against the live store before checkout.
The site supports customer registration and login, favourites/wishlist, profile access, and order history.
The site displays a Book A Time feature, but opening it while signed out redirects to customer login.

The site accepts online applications for Cashier, General Labour, Restaurant, Meat Shop, Customer Service, and Other positions. Applicants provide availability and upload a PDF or DOC resume up to 300 KB.
App Store and Play Store badges appear on the site, but their links are placeholders rather than active store destinations.
Facebook and Twitter icons appear on the site, but their links are placeholders rather than active profile destinations.
The COVID-19 Response and COVID-19 Delivery pages currently say 'Coming Soon' and should not be treated as current operational guidance.
Using Asian Food Centre services indicates acceptance of its terms, and the site states that terms may change without notice.
The site says information is believed accurate when posted but is not guaranteed at all times; services are provided as-is and third-party links are used at the visitor's own risk.
The terms state that Asian Food Centre may terminate or limit access to services, including for terms or intellectual-property violations.
The site includes indemnity and limitation-of-liability terms covering use of its services, third-party links, errors, delays, and circumstances outside its control.

bot_guardrails: Treat prices and stock as a snapshot, not a guarantee.
Do not promise delivery coverage or timing when the site does not specify it.
For returns involving perishables, opened products, or unusual circumstances, refer the customer to store management.
When a location-specific answer is needed, ask which store the customer means.
Do not present placeholder app-store or social links as working destinations.
Do not treat the site's COVID pages as current guidance because their content is only 'Coming Soon'.
